name: @rayspec/capability-bridges
description: The durable-workflow ↔ capability composition seams for the four ingress capabilities (audio · conversation · file · record), merged into one package. Each capability's canonical event → WorkflowInputEvent adapter + the fail-closed *Sink a deployment injects to enqueue a durable workflow run on ingress. Homed here so neither the neutral Tier A engine nor the Tier B capabilities depend on the other.
